verse_text: If it pleases the king, let him make a decree to destroy them. If so, I will pay ten thousand talents of silver into the king's treasury.'

links.context: The claim that the work of God is rebellion and harmful to kings whom God Himself has established is a standard ploy of Satan in his attempts to destroy God's obedient ones ([[EST.3:8]], [[EST.3:9]]). This culminates in the charge that would be leveled against Christ Himself ([[JOH.19:12]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
